queries: Goldman Sachs GS Q1 2026 earnings results

results.title: Goldman Sachs Reports 2026 First Quarter Earnings Per Common Share of $17.55 and Annualized Return on Common Equity of 19.8%
results.snippet: Goldman Sachs reported net revenues of $17.23 billion and net earnings of $5.63 billion for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026. Diluted earnings per common share was $17.55 and annualized return on average common shareholders’ equity was 19.8%.

results.title: First Quarter 2026 Earnings Results
results.snippet: This document details Goldman Sachs' Q1 2026 financials including $17.23 billion in net revenues and $5.63 billion in net earnings. It covers performance across Global Banking & Markets, Asset & Wealth Management, and other segments.

results.title: 1Q26 GS Earnings Results Presentation
results.snippet: The presentation summarizes strong Q1 2026 results with record assets under supervision of $3.65 trillion and net revenues of $17.23 billion. It highlights record equities net revenues and robust investment banking fees.

results.title: Goldman Sachs Q1 2026 earnings: Market chaos is good for business
results.snippet: Goldman Sachs posted Q1 2026 net earnings of $5.63 billion, up 19% year-over-year, driven by a record equities trading quarter. Revenues rose 14% to $17.23 billion, beating analyst expectations despite market volatility.

results.title: Investor Relations
results.snippet: This page hosts Goldman Sachs' Q1 2026 earnings release and related documents. It reports diluted EPS of $17.55 and an annualized ROE of 19.8% for the quarter ended March 31, 2026.

results.title: 2026 Summer Analyst Program
results.snippet: Goldman Sachs offers a 2026 Summer Analyst Program, a nine to ten week summer internship for undergraduate students. Participants are fully immersed in day-to-day activities across the firm.

results.title: Programs and Internships
results.snippet: Goldman Sachs provides various 2026 summer internship programs including Summer Analyst and Summer Associate roles in the Americas and EMEA. These programs offer support networks, events, and opportunities for students to begin their careers.

results.title: New Analyst Program
results.snippet: The New Analyst Program at Goldman Sachs is designed for students graduating between December 2026 and July 2027. It is a full-time role where analysts learn about businesses like Investment Banking and develop key relationships and skills.

results.title: 2026 Outlooks
results.snippet: Goldman Sachs Research expects global growth of 2.8% in 2026. The outlooks include perspectives on Investment Banking, global M&A, and US economic resilience.

results.title: Key Insights from Goldman Sachs Investment Banking's 2026 Global M&A Outlook
results.snippet: Fundamental drivers of M&A activity are aligned heading into 2026 according to Goldman Sachs Investment Banking. The outlook highlights a primed landscape for strategic growth and continued deal activity.

results.title: 2026 Outlooks
results.snippet: Goldman Sachs Research economists expect sturdy global growth of 2.8% in 2026, versus a consensus forecast of 2.5%. Goldman Sachs Research analysts remain constructive on equities for 2026 as earnings continue to grow, but forecast lower index returns than in 2025 amid a broadening bull market.

results.title: The Goldman Sachs Group (GS) Stock Forecast and Price Target
results.snippet: Analysts expect Goldman Sachs to report solid earnings with projected EPS around $16.49. The average twelve-month stock price forecast for The Goldman Sachs Group is $919.48 according to 22 Wall Street equities research analysts.

results.title: Goldman Sachs (GS) Stock Forecast: Analyst Ratings, Predictions & Price Target 2026
results.snippet: 15 analysts have given Goldman Sachs (GS) a consensus rating of Hold. The Goldman Sachs (GS) price prediction in 2026 is $895.20.

results.title: Markets Outlook 2026: Some Like It Hot
results.snippet: Sturdy global growth coupled with non-recessionary Fed cuts should be positive for global equities, but tensions with 'hot valuations' may increase volatility. Goldman Sachs Research is constructive on equities for 2026.

results.title: Goldman Sachs highlights call buying opportunities for 2026 in new report
results.snippet: Goldman Sachs forecasts the S&P 500 index will reach 7600 by year-end 2026 citing expectations for healthy economic and revenue growth. The firm highlighted 56 stocks that offer attractive call buying opportunities based on analyst recommendations for 2026.
